title: corydalis mira subsp. mira
intro: Corydalis mira subsp. mira is a plant species belonging to the Corydalis genus, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China and other parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including pain, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Corydalis mira subsp. mira include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to improve respiratory function and boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, Corydalis mira subsp. mira is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical formulations to leverage its medicinal properties.
